title: App Store Connect — IAP creation rejected (reference name + product ID already used)
html:
App Store Connect "Create an In-App Purchase" modal showing two validation errors: "The reference name you entered is already being used" and "The Product ID you entered is already being used by another in-app purchase associated with this team." Yahir tried to re-create brotein_premium_monthly as Type=Consumable. Easy fix: edit the existing one instead of recreating.

brotein · app store connect · revenuecat

related.label: App Store Connect — Brotein Premium subscription order (Monthly first, then Yearly)
